# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_REPO: $CI_PROJECT_URL
  COMMIT_MESSAGE: "Deploying feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the application..."
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the application..."
    - echo "Release Notes:"
    - echo "Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Tagging deployment with: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - git tag -a "deploy-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" -m "$COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - git push origin "deploy-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - master
  dependencies:
    - build
